title: Deleted Column Value - "This operation was made by an automation"

posts.author: JasonBenichou (Jason Benichou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Since yesterday, we have a problem, every time we create an item on our board (via API v2), column values of this item are automatically deleted.

You can see attached an example for one of our created items. It is written that “This operation was made by an automation”. But we don’t have any automation created.

Could someone help us?
Thank you,
Jason

Screenshot 2021-02-08 at 10.57.492756×1604 241 KB
Screenshot 2021-02-08 at 10.58.101016×1218 87.6 KB

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @JasonBenichou - By any chance, do you have any default values set for those columns? Default values tend to “overrule” automation values. Just a thought, although it sounds like a bug.

posts.author: JasonBenichou (Jason Benichou)
posts.cookedHtml:
No,

We don’t have default values… Someone has an idea to resolve it ?

Thank you
